title: Scorpion scorpion_exo_r420_course-tc-5

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner
specs.strap_type: Quick-Release Magnetic Buckle with YKK Hardware

technical_analysis: The scorpion_exo_r420_course-tc-5 utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber weave architecture that significantly reduces rotational energy transfer during high-impact collisions. Its internal EPS liner is segmented into variable-density zones, providing superior protection for the temporal and occipital regions while maintaining an ultra-lightweight profile of just 1280 grams. The integrated aerodynamic fairing system channels airflow to minimize drag at speeds exceeding 160 km/h, reducing rider fatigue on long-distance touring.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight protection with the Scorpion Exo R420 Course TC-5, engineered for riders who demand uncompromising performance without the weight penalty. This full-face helmet combines advanced carbon fiber technology with a sleek, aggressive design that turns heads on the track and the street alike.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Scorpion Exo R420 Course TC-5: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face helmet featuring ECE 22.06 certification, magnetic buckle system, and optimized aerodynamics for high-speed touring.
